failedAssertions.reason: 126K LOC repo indexed in 96.54s (target: <60s). Embedding API round-trips are the bottleneck. Rate limiting adds ~18-21s; even without rate limits, estimated ~75-78s still exceeds target. Need query/chunk embedding caching, local embedding model, or batch size optimization.

p95 query latency is 7047ms (target: <500ms). Each hybrid search requires a remote embedding API call (~4s per query). BM25-only is 2.9ms p95. Cold start is 5012ms (target: <2s). Architecture fundamentally depends on remote API for vector search. Fix options: query embedding cache, local embedding model, or accept higher latency with remote API.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: Core Engine CLI' section with Vera binary path, API credential setup, pre-indexed repo paths, known issues (reranker API connectivity), isolation rules, and key commands.
